title: narcissus requienii var. pallens
intro: Narcissus requienii var. pallens is a rare and unique variety of the narcissus plant, specifically a type of wild daffodil known for its delicate white and pale yellow flowers. The plant is also recognized for its potential medicinal properties, including its ability to be used as a natural antiseptic and to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Narcissus requienii var. pallens is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving coughs, and promoting digestion. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, teas, and infusions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes due to potential toxicity and interactions.
